When the assistant presents route options for Bremen to Amsterdam, again choose the fastest route which goes via B259, K26, L361 (about 4 hours 1 minute). Tell the assistant about this development and ask them to remove Amsterdam from your route so that Bremen becomes your final destination instead. Select the best valid charging station stop, obtain route segments for current location to charger and charger to destination, and set or edit navigation accordingly following active/inactive navigation policy.
Check whether all user intents were resolved and communicate any limitations if something could not be fulfilled.

Nearby fast food found: McDonald's, open until 23:00. The charging station remains the stop; fast food is nearby, not the navigation waypoint.

Done — navigation’s set to Andorra la Vella with the charging stop as the actual waypoint.

I picked Engie Electric as your stop. It should line up at about 19:37, so that lands nicely in your 19:00 to 19:45 window. There’s a McDonald’s nearby, open until 23:00, so you can grab fast food there while charging.

I used the fastest route for both segments since this is now a multi-stop route, and both chosen segments are toll-free.

If you want, I can also tell you the detour time for the charger and the fast food spot.
